mano_cua.result_summary: 点击底部横幅中的 'Become an Ambassador now' 紫色按钮后，跳转到 GitHub 页面显示 404 错误。链接指向 AMBASSADOR_ORGANIZATION.md（不存在），正确应为 AMBASSADOR_PROGRAM.md。URL: github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/AMBASSADOR_ORGANIZATION.md#are-you-interested-in-becoming-an-official-asyncapi-ambassador。错误信息: The master branch of community does not contain the path AMBASSADOR_ORGANIZATION.md。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: 页面已加载完成。点击 'Become an Ambassador now' 按钮后，跳转到了 GitHub 页面，但显示了 404 - page not found 错误。跳转 URL: github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/AMBASSADOR_ORGANIZATION.md。错误信息: The master branch of community does not contain the path AMBASSADOR_ORGANIZATION.md。这是一个链接配置错误的 Bug，按钮指向了错误的文件路径。
